description: Stores multiple shipping/billing addresses per customer.

chunks.text:
TABLE: customer_addresses

DESCRIPTION: Stores multiple shipping/billing addresses per customer.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: addresses, customer addresses, shipping addresses, billing addresses, delivery addresses, address book

PRIMARY_KEY: address_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: customer_id → customers.customer_id

COLUMNS: address_id, customer_id, address_type, is_default, address_line1, address_line2, city, state, zip_code, country, phone, created_at

USE_CASES: Shipping address lookup, address book, delivery location analysis
